pregame_reference_line.moneyline: NYK favorite around -190 to -220 depending book

josh_hart.model_error: Projected rebound role was not updated aggressively enough when Cleveland conceded open perimeter looks and Hart became a volume shooter instead of a weakside rebounder.
josh_hart.patch: If Hart 3PA >= 5 by halftime and rebounds <= 2, downgrade rebound overs by 18% to 28%.

karl_anthony_towns.model_note: Actual rebound funnel moved toward KAT, not Hart. KAT defensive-board stability should have been the preferred Knicks rebound channel.

jalen_brunson.model_note: Brunson shifted into creator mode; Knicks scoring was distributed rather than Brunson-only.

cleveland_creation.model_note: Cleveland failed to generate enough assisted shot quality; Harden/Mitchell assist suppression should have downgraded live CLE team total over.

diagnostic_findings.finding: Hart's offensive role displaced his rebound lane access. The model incorrectly treated Hart's minutes and weakside role as rebound-positive after shot-volume evidence showed otherwise.
Cleveland's live total was over-attacked despite poor creation indicators: low assist volume, poor 3PT efficiency, and too much self-created late-clock offense.
NYK over 109.5 lost by one point. Late lead state reduced urgency and created clock-bleed risk; team total overs need suppression when favorite leads by 15+ in the fourth.
The game-state read was stronger than the final bet selection. The portfolio over-weighted rebound and team-total overs without enough confirmation of repeatable possession quality.

LIVEFLOW_RULE_UPDATE: No 2H or live team total over unless primary creator assists are flowing.
Require at least two reliable scoring lanes before entering live overs.
Avoid team total overs when lead state projects late clock bleed.
Current shot profile must support repeatable points, not just hot shooting.
REBOUND_RULE_UPDATE: Do not play wing rebound overs when the opponent is intentionally using that player as the defensive concession shooter.
If player shot-volume spike emerges early, downgrade rebound projection immediately.
Separate minutes-based rebound projection from role-based rebound access.

next_actions: Patch Hart rebound profile with shot-volume displacement gate.
Patch Cleveland team-total model with creation-fragility gate.
Patch live team total overs with late-lead suppression gate.
Limit next live slate to one confirmed edge only until model regains traction.
notes: No ghost bet was placed on this matchup. All three tracked positions were live or pre-live exposures and finished as losses. The key lesson is not that the model missed the game script entirely; the leak was converting partial reads into the wrong markets.
